description: Counterparty specifies a destruction timeline for Confidential Information. This is a listed acceptable_variation in the confidentiality topic ('30 to 90 days after termination'); this hunk also intentionally avoids no-uncapped-liability's trigger vocabulary since that rule also applies to the confidentiality topic.

must_not_flag.reason: A destruction-timeline clause contains none of no-uncapped-liability's trigger vocabulary even though the rule also applies to this topic; must not fire.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Confidential Information shall be destroyed or returned within 60 days following termination of this Agreement, upon the disclosing party's written request.
planted_variation.notes: Matches acceptable_variation 'Counterparty specifies a destruction timeline' -> '30 to 90 days after termination'.

detector_expectation.rationale: Hunk contains none of trigger_terms ['uncapped', 'unlimited liability', 'no cap on liability', 'shall not be limited', 'without limit'].

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
